title: Integrating Shopify, Klaviyo & ShipStation with monday.com – What’s Working, What’s Not?
excerpt:
:waving_hand: Hey monday.com community, 
I’m working on exploring better ways to connect Shopify (store management), Klaviyo (email marketing), and ShipStation (shipping/fulfillment) with monday.com—and I’m hoping to lea…

posts.author: diva-D (David Gentile - App Builder)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday.com community,

I’m working on exploring better ways to connect Shopify (store management), Klaviyo (email marketing), and ShipStation (shipping/fulfillment) with monday.com—and I’m hoping to learn from folks who’ve already been through the trenches.

If you’ve tried integrating any (or all!) of these tools with monday.com, I’d love to hear about:

  • Your biggest pain points: What’s the most frustrating part of keeping data flowing between these platforms? Where do things break down?
  • Your ideas for improvement: What would actually make your life easier? Specific features? Automations? A button labeled “Fix everything?”
  • Your wishlist: If you could wave a magic wand and have one integration feature instantly built, what would it be?
  • Your interest in testing: If I start prototyping solutions based on this feedback, would you be open to early beta testing?

To make it easy, I’ve set up a short feedback form here: https://davidgentile.notion.site/1ca8ffcb44938014ab7edb15226bb351?pvs=105

If you’d rather not fill out a form (I get it) feel free to leave comments below.

Your insights will help shape potential new apps for the monday.com marketplace—ones that (fingers crossed) actually address real e-commerce needs. And as a thank-you, anyone who fills out the form or helps with testing will get early access to anything I build.

Thanks in advance—I’m excited to hear what’s worked, what hasn’t, and what needs to exist.
